data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of reporting and grouping by custom field values. However, the evidence provided does not confirm that the system can report or group by the custom fields defined in the use case. Specifically, while the use case outlines various custom fields, there is no evidence demonstrating that these fields can be utilized for reporting or grouping, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of reporting and grouping functionality for custom fields.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add reporting functionality evidence
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that custom fields can be used for reporting and grouping.
